queries.question: What are the topics of the press conference with Jack Layton and what are the topics of media scrums with him?
queries.sql:
SELECT Press_Conferences.topic
FROM Press_Conferences
WHERE Press_Conferences.person = "Jack Layton"
UNION
SELECT Media_Scrums.topic
FROM Media_Scrums
WHERE Media_Scrums.person = "Jack Layton"

queries.question: List all press conference topics and also display the topics of media scrums involving Jack Layton.
queries.sql:
SELECT Press_Conferences.topic
FROM Press_Conferences
UNION
SELECT Media_Scrums.topic
FROM Media_Scrums
WHERE Media_Scrums.person = "Jack Layton"

ambiguous_dsl.question: What are the topics of all press conferences and media scrums with Jack Layton?
